part_number_or_code: Spec-led molded upper radiator hose for HJ47/2H route; Toyota 16571-68020 and Dayco DMH1342 / CH1342 are cross-references
dimension_spec_mm: Standard HJ47/2H molded hose; published DMH1342 free length 355 mm; sample-match on receipt and choose clamps by installed hose OD
exact_order_spec: Order a molded EPDM coolant hose for the upper radiator route using Toyota 16571-68020 and Dayco DMH1342 / CH1342 as accepted shape references. Published DMH1342 free length is 355 mm; shape still controls over straight cut length.
material_spec: EPDM coolant hose, SAE J20R4 or molded equivalent
user_action_required: Order standard molded hose; compare to old/fitted route on receipt and dry-fit before coolant fill.
do_not_order_if: Received hose shape, radiator neck, or thermostat housing geometry does not match the HJ47 2H route.
notes: Order with correct smooth-band or constant-tension clamps; dry-fit before filling coolant.

part_number_or_code: Spec-led molded lower radiator hose for HJ47/2H route; Toyota 16572-68020 and Dayco DMH1343 / CH1343 are cross-references
dimension_spec_mm: Standard HJ47/2H molded hose; published DMH1343 free length 480 mm; sample-match on receipt and choose clamps by installed hose OD
exact_order_spec: Order a molded EPDM coolant hose for the lower radiator route using Toyota 16572-68020 and Dayco DMH1343 / CH1343 as accepted shape references. Published DMH1343 free length is 480 mm; shape still controls over straight cut length.
material_spec: EPDM coolant hose, SAE J20R4 or molded equivalent
user_action_required: Order standard molded hose; compare to old/fitted route on receipt and dry-fit before coolant fill.
do_not_order_if: Received hose shape, lower outlet, engine inlet, or front crossmember clearance proves non-standard.
notes: Replace as a pair with the upper radiator hose and pressure-test after fill.

part_number_or_code: Small EPDM coolant overflow hose; Toyota 90445-12078 is a 600 mm reference length
dimension_spec_mm: 1000 mm EPDM overflow hose buy length; finished route trims shorter; OE reference length 600 mm
exact_order_spec: Order exactly 1000 mm of small EPDM coolant overflow hose and trim to the radiator-to-bottle route during installation. Toyota 90445-12078 remains a 600 mm OE reference, not the local buy limit.
material_spec: Small EPDM coolant/overflow hose
user_action_required: Buy 1000 mm small EPDM overflow hose stock and trim to route during install.
do_not_order_if: Overflow bottle, radiator neck, or routing is missing or changed from the planned route.
notes: Extra length is planned trim allowance so the shop can cut cleanly and avoid kinks.

part_number_or_code: EPDM heater hose cut length 400 mm; Toyota 99552-30500 / 99556-30500 are cross-references
dimension_spec_mm: 1000 mm stock buy shared with outlet; finished inlet cut 400 mm; standard 16 mm ID / 5/8 in heater hose
qty_to_order: 1000 mm local hose stock shared for inlet/outlet
exact_order_spec: Order 1000 mm of EPDM SAE J20R3 or better heater hose, 16 mm ID / 5/8 in. Cut the inlet to 400 mm during installation; the remaining stock covers outlet and trim allowance.
material_spec: EPDM heater hose, SAE J20R3 or better
user_action_required: Buy 1000 mm of 16 mm / 5/8 in heater hose stock and cut a 400 mm inlet section.
do_not_order_if: Received hose does not fit the actual engine/heater nipples or rear-heater branch changes the planned route.
notes: Exact stock length is released; final trim is only for routing and chafe clearance.

part_number_or_code: EPDM heater hose cut length 280 mm; Toyota 99552-30300 / 99556-30300 are cross-references
dimension_spec_mm: 1000 mm stock buy shared with inlet; finished outlet cut 280 mm; standard 16 mm ID / 5/8 in heater hose
qty_to_order: 1000 mm local hose stock shared for inlet/outlet
exact_order_spec: Order 1000 mm of EPDM SAE J20R3 or better heater hose, 16 mm ID / 5/8 in. Cut the outlet to 280 mm during installation; the remaining stock is trim allowance.
material_spec: EPDM heater hose, SAE J20R3 or better
user_action_required: Buy 1000 mm of 16 mm / 5/8 in heater hose stock and cut a 280 mm outlet section.
do_not_order_if: Received hose does not fit the actual engine/heater nipples or rear-heater branch changes the planned route.
notes: Exact stock length is released; final trim is only for routing and chafe clearance.

part_number_or_code: Physical sample and RP-COOL-005 fabrication spec
dimension_spec_mm: 28-30 mm OD tube; 1.2-1.6 mm wall; 1000 mm shop stock preferred or 750 mm absolute minimum blank; bead height 1.5-2.0 mm; straight clamp lands 25-30 mm each end
qty_to_order: 1000 mm tube stock quote or 750 mm minimum blank plus bending/forming
exact_order_spec: Fabricate one formed coolant pipe from 28-30 mm OD coolant-compatible tube with 1.2-1.6 mm wall. Use 1000 mm tube stock if the shop sells by meter; 750 mm is the absolute minimum blank before bending/trimming. Copy the physical sample, add 1.5-2.0 mm hose-retention beads, and leave 25-30 mm straight clamp lands at both ends.
material_spec: Mild steel/aluminized steel or 304 stainless coolant-compatible tube; target wall 1.2-1.6 mm after fabricator confirmation
user_action_required: Send the physical sample and May 2 tape photos; fabricator copies bends/clocking/offsets, trims excess stock, beads ends, dry-fits, and pressure-tests before coating.
do_not_order_if: Shop cannot use 28-30 mm OD coolant tube, cannot bead ends, will not copy the physical sample, or cannot dry-fit before coating.
notes: The tube stock is now exact for ordering; only the final bent centerline trim is copied from the sample.

item: Formed coolant pipe connector hose - end A

dimension_spec_mm: New 500 mm EPDM radiator/coolant connector blank; 28-30 mm ID exact order basis; trim shorter from sample during dry-fit
exact_order_spec: Order one new 500 mm EPDM radiator/coolant connector blank for formed pipe end A, 28-30 mm ID exact order basis. Trim shorter from the old coupler/sample during dry-fit; use a new molded EPDM connector only if straight hose kinks.
material_spec: New EPDM coolant hose, SAE J20R3/J20R4 or molded coolant equivalent; new smooth-band or constant-tension clamps
user_action_required: Buy one new 500 mm connector blank and trim by sample/vehicle dry-fit.
do_not_order_if: Straight hose kinks or connector angle cannot be confirmed at dry-fit.
notes: Extra length is intentional trim allowance; do not reuse old coupler by default.

item: Formed coolant pipe connector hose - end B
part_number_or_code: New 500 mm EPDM radiator hose blank for connector B
dimension_spec_mm: New 500 mm EPDM radiator/coolant connector blank; 28-30 mm ID exact order basis; trim shorter from sample during dry-fit
exact_order_spec: Order one new 500 mm EPDM radiator/coolant connector blank for formed pipe end B, 28-30 mm ID exact order basis. Trim shorter from the old coupler/sample during dry-fit; use a new molded EPDM connector only if straight hose kinks.
material_spec: New EPDM coolant hose, SAE J20R3/J20R4 or molded coolant equivalent; new smooth-band or constant-tension clamps
user_action_required: Buy one new 500 mm connector blank and trim by sample/vehicle dry-fit.
do_not_order_if: Straight hose kinks or connector angle cannot be confirmed at dry-fit.

part_number_or_code: 8 mm ID diesel hose
dimension_spec_mm: 8 mm ID x 1500 mm buy length; measured tank-to-engine feed route approximately 1200 mm; cut to route on vehicle
exact_order_spec: Order low-pressure diesel feed hose by spec: 8 mm ID x 1500 mm, then cut to the measured approximately 1200 mm tank-to-engine feed route on vehicle.
material_spec: Diesel-rated SAE J30R9, SAE J30R14T2, or DIN 73379-3E hose
user_action_required: Buy 1500 mm of 8 mm diesel-rated feed hose stock and rolled-edge fuel-injection clamps.
do_not_order_if: Any section is high-pressure injector pipe, received hose is not diesel-rated, or the original route proves it should be rigid hard line instead of flexible hose.
notes: This line is the measured long feed from tank/chassis route to engine/filter; use rolled-edge fuel-injection clamps and avoid unsupported rub/chafe.

part_number_or_code: 6 mm ID diesel hose
dimension_spec_mm: 6 mm ID x 2000 mm buy length; cut to route on vehicle
exact_order_spec: Order low-pressure diesel return/bleed hose by spec: 6 mm ID x 2000 mm, then cut to route on vehicle.
material_spec: Diesel-rated SAE J30R9, SAE J30R14T2, or DIN 73379-3E hose
user_action_required: Buy 6 mm diesel-rated return/bleed hose stock and rolled-edge fuel-injection clamps.
do_not_order_if: Received hose is not diesel-rated or the route uses a molded section.
notes: Use rolled-edge fuel-injection clamps; avoid air-ingress points and sharp bends.

part_number_or_code: 3.2-3.5 mm ID braided diesel leak-off hose
dimension_spec_mm: 3.2-3.5 mm ID x 1000 mm buy length; cut to injector leak-off route
exact_order_spec: Order injector leak-off hose by spec: 3.2-3.5 mm ID braided diesel leak-off hose x 1000 mm.
material_spec: Braided diesel leak-off hose rated for diesel return service
user_action_required: Buy 3.2-3.5 mm braided diesel leak-off hose stock and verify diesel rating on receipt.
do_not_order_if: Injector return arrangement differs from the planned leak-off hose type or hose is not diesel-rated.
notes: Do not substitute vacuum or coolant hose for diesel leak-off service.

part_number_or_code: 8 mm OD feed tube
dimension_spec_mm: Conditional orderable pipe length: 5000 mm coil/straight tube allowance only if a separate rigid feed line exists beyond the measured RPO-FUEL-001A flexible feed hose
qty_to_order: 5000 mm coil or measured shorter sections only if rigid line exists
exact_order_spec: If the old route includes a separate low-pressure rigid feed hard line beyond the measured 1200 mm flexible feed hose, replace that hard line with new 8 mm OD tube from a 5000 mm allowance and copy the original route, end style, bends, and clips.
material_spec: New automotive bundy steel or CuNi/Cunifer tube; no bare copper
user_action_required: Verify whether a separate rigid feed line exists. Do not buy this feed tube if RPO-FUEL-001A is the complete tank-to-engine feed route.
do_not_order_if: Fitting/thread style cannot be identified, old line route cannot be copied, only used/plumbing/bare copper tube is offered, or no separate rigid feed line exists.
notes: Use rubber-lined P-clips every 300-400 mm and leak-test after fuel prime if fabricated.

part_number_or_code: 6 mm OD return tube
dimension_spec_mm: Orderable pipe length: 5000 mm coil/straight tube allowance for new return line; final section copied from old line
qty_to_order: 5000 mm coil or measured shorter sections
exact_order_spec: Replace the old low-pressure return hard line with new 6 mm OD tube from a 5000 mm allowance, then copy the original route, end style, bends, and clips.
material_spec: New automotive bundy steel or CuNi/Cunifer tube; no bare copper
user_action_required: Buy 6 mm OD return tube stock and copy old line sections during installation.
do_not_order_if: Fitting/thread style cannot be identified, old line route cannot be copied, or only used/plumbing/bare copper tube is offered.
notes: Use rubber-lined P-clips every 300-400 mm and leak-test after fuel prime.

part_number_or_code: 10-12 mm ID reinforced vacuum hose
dimension_spec_mm: 10-12 mm ID reinforced vacuum hose x 2000 mm exact buy length; trim to pump/booster/check-valve route
exact_order_spec: Order exactly 2000 mm of reinforced oil-resistant brake-booster/vacuum hose, 10-12 mm ID. Trim to the pump, booster, and check-valve route during installation.
material_spec: Reinforced oil-resistant vacuum hose
user_action_required: Buy 2000 mm reinforced vacuum hose stock; trim to route and confirm check-valve direction/no collapse during installation.
do_not_order_if: Vacuum route uses a molded hose that cannot be replaced by straight reinforced hose or measured barbs fall outside the 10-12 mm ID order range.
notes: Standard stock order is released; final brake-assist vacuum and check-valve operation remain install checks.

part_number_or_code: 16-19 mm ID oil-resistant hose
dimension_spec_mm: 16-19 mm ID oil-resistant breather hose x 1000 mm exact buy length; trim to breather route
exact_order_spec: Order exactly 1000 mm of 16-19 mm ID oil-resistant breather/oil-mist hose. Trim to the breather route during installation after confirming spigot fit.
material_spec: NBR or fuel/oil-rated hose for breather/oil mist exposure
user_action_required: Buy 1000 mm oil-resistant breather hose stock; trim to route and confirm heat/chafe clearance during installation.
do_not_order_if: Breather route requires a molded shape or measured spigots fall outside the 16-19 mm ID order range.
notes: Do not use coolant-only EPDM where oil mist exposure can swell the material.

part_number_or_code: New oil-compatible molded hose; Toyota/OEM 90923-02079 only if fitted
dimension_spec_mm: If sourcing locally, measure overall free length, end IDs, bend shape, and both fitting ODs in mm; otherwise buy exact new molded equivalent only
exact_order_spec: If the fitted engine uses the 2H vacuum pump oil outlet hose, source a new oil-compatible molded equivalent. Use Toyota/OEM 90923-02079 only as the reference after confirming fitted presence and mm end dimensions if sourcing locally.
material_spec: New oil-compatible molded hose or OEM equivalent
user_action_required: Confirm whether this hose is fitted on the engine; photograph both ends and measure overall length, end IDs, and fitting ODs in mm if sourcing local. If fitted, replace with new.
do_not_order_if: The hose is not fitted on this engine or routing differs from the OEM item.
notes: Presence-gated only; no used hose.

part_number_or_code: New vehicle-specific front/rear brake flex hoses
dimension_spec_mm: 3 new complete assemblies: front left, front right, rear center; each assembly free length copied from old hose in mm or matched to current vehicle/OEM assembly
exact_order_spec: Quote/order new complete crimped brake flex assemblies only: current front-disc/rear-drum hardware, old-sample free length, end thread/banjo/seat, bracket groove, and retention must match.
material_spec: New brake-fluid-compatible flex hoses meeting DOT/SAE J1401 or OEM-equivalent rating
user_action_required: Take old hose samples or current fittings to the hydraulic shop; copy each assembly free length and end style. Do not buy roll hose or used hose.
do_not_order_if: Seller cannot match old assembly free length/end fittings or cannot confirm DOT/SAE J1401 or OEM-equivalent brake rating.
notes: Quote-ready for local hydraulic shop; final release still requires fitting match, bleed, pressure test, and no stretch/contact check.

exact_order_spec: Order 20 mixed new rubber-lined P-clips plus fasteners for 4.75 mm, 6 mm, and 8 mm hard-line OD, with edge/pass-through protection. Use 300-400 mm support spacing.
